_readme: HOW TO ADD A NEW PUZZLE DAY
1. Create a folder: puzzles/YYYY-MM-DD/
2. Copy this file six times, rename each to the club slug:
arsenal.json, chelsea.json, liverpool.json,
manchester-city.json, manchester-united.json, tottenham.json
3. Fill in the fields below for each club.
4. Commit and push — Vercel deploys automatically.
FIELD GUIDE
date        : ISO date string matching the folder name.
club        : URL slug (must match the filename without .json).
clubLabel   : Displayed in the question card, e.g. 'Arsenal:'.
clubShort   : Used in share text, e.g. 'Arsenal'.
question    : The challenge, written as a continuation of the club label.
Example — card reads: 'Arsenal: name the last 10 permanent managers'
note        : Small print under the question (season cutoff, ordering rules).
placeholder : Hint text inside the guess input field.
answers     : Array of exactly 10 objects.
display   : The canonical name shown when the slot is filled or revealed.
detail    : Small info shown alongside the name (years, goal count, caps, etc.).
accept    : Array of strings the fuzzy matcher will accept.
Include: full name, surname only, common nicknames.
Accents optional — norm() strips them before comparison.
DO NOT include alternative people with the same surname
(e.g. don't add 'hodgson' if Roy Hodgson isn't an answer).
VERIFICATION CHECKLIST
- Cross-check every answer against Wikipedia and the official club site.
- Set the 'note' field to the season/date through which data was verified.
- Caretakers and interim managers: decide your rule and apply it consistently.
The launch-day puzzle excludes caretakers; keep that consistent.
- For goal/appearance counts: use the club's official all-time records page
and note the source in a comment here.
question: name the last 10 permanent managers
note: No caretakers · through July 2026 · any order
